title: Behavioral eval TASK.md metadata
description: The `- key: value` metadata list at the top of a golden task's TASK.md, as the object eval_task_meta parses. The runner (scripts/harness/run-evals) validates these enums at run time and dies on any other value; this schema is the same contract for editors and generators. Defaults apply when a key is absent.

polarity.description: negative tasks assert the agent does NOT take a forbidden shortcut

provider.description: absent means any; a pinned task refuses other real providers (mock is always exempt)

network.description: required adds the labeled Codex local/private-network compatibility overrides

execution.description: provider-config-write demands the caller's --allow-provider-config-write acknowledgment and cannot combine with network: required
